libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Do not use the removed classic TypedActor API from org.apache.pekko.actor. Prefer current classic actor APIs in pekko-actor_2.13, or only use org.apache.pekko.actor.typed APIs if intentionally adding/testing the separate pekko-actor-typed module. If tests deliberately exercise Pekko DNS internals that access sun.net.dns, keep the existing JVM/native-image --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED style setup.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Adding pekko-actor-typed_2.13 would test an adjacent module rather than fixing coverage for the requested pekko-actor_2.13 artifact unless the workflow explicitly chooses typed APIs.
Existing 1.1.5 tests that import org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedProps, or TypedActorExtension must be rewritten or removed for 2.0.0-M1.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or environment setup is required for meaningful coverage of org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1. The resolved artifact only depends on scala-library and com.typesafe:config, and core ActorSystem/Props/serialization/config APIs are usable directly. The reported failure is from stale tests using org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps/TypedActorExtension, which are no longer present in the 2.0.0-M1 actor jar, not from missing setup.
